PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: BURTON M. GREENBER, Attorney for Petitioner
The court examiner is questioning the easment re: the land slide and is there any reason to be concerned. Counsel states that there is no reason to be concerned. The property in question was not damaged in the land slide. Counsel has already recieved the $70,000.00 and is waiting for the court to approve this matter. The court also quetioned if there is any other pending litigation. Counsel states that there is no other matters pending. This petition was granted.
COMMISSIONER:DOROTHY MC MATH, REPORTER:KATY BESAMIN, CSR#11722, CLERK: LARRISA DOTSON,
BALIFF:J. GUITRON

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
